overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic sci-fi memorial hall (Star Citizen), featuring massive golden statues, the Harold Hurston Memorial Hall with weapon displays, and upper exhibit corridors. The player walks through exterior plazas and indoor halls with high-end game engine graphics.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a monumental plaza at night, flanked by massive golden statues. The camera moves steadily toward a wide staircase leading into a futuristic building, with the night sky visible above and sparse pedestrians in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry hall with welcome signage and stairwell

events.description: entering the building from the exterior plaza
beginning ascent of the main interior staircase

agents.ego_description: entering the memorial hall and ascending the main stairwell with yellow accent lighting

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading Welcome to Central Business District
wide staircase with yellow accent lighting and glass railings

segments.scene_description: The player enters the building, passing under a 'Welcome to Central Business District' sign. The scene transitions to an interior stairwell with artificial lighting, where the player ascends wide stairs with glass railings toward an upper entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Harold Hurston Memorial Hall with weapon exhibits

events.description: entering the main memorial hall with the large golden statue
turning to view the weapon displays in glass cases

agents.ego_description: exploring the memorial hall, observing the central golden statue and weapon displays in glass cases

large dark stone monument with inscribed text

segments.scene_description: The player enters the grand Harold Hurston Memorial Hall, dominated by a massive central golden statue. The space features glass display cases with futuristic weapons and a large black monument with inscriptions. NPCs walk through the hall as the player explores the exhibits.

scene_state.functional_zone: A2 Hologram exhibit area and upper stairwell

events.description: moving from the main hall to the A2 Hologram exhibit area
ascending the secondary staircase to the upper level

agents.ego_description: moving through the upper memorial hall toward the A2 Hologram exhibit and ascending secondary stairs

entered.detail: stairs leading to upper level with glass railings

segments.scene_description: The player transitions to a secondary hall marked by an 'A2 Hologram' sign, leaving the main statue behind. The environment becomes more enclosed as the player ascends another staircase with glass railings toward the upper exhibit level.

scene_state.functional_zone: Legacy exhibit corridor and final chambers

events.description: entering the Legacy exhibit corridor with wall inscriptions
turning into the final room with glass entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the Legacy exhibit corridor observing wall text displays and entering the final chamber

entered.detail: wall with large text reading LEGACY and additional inscriptions
narrow hallway with spot lighting and metal railings
glass doorway with illuminated ENTRANCE sign

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow corridor featuring the 'Legacy' wall exhibit with inscribed text. The lighting becomes more dramatic with spotlights as the player moves through the upper level, eventually approaching a glass doorway marked 'Entrance' in the final chamber.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a monumental outdoor plaza at night into the increasingly intimate and dramatic corridors of a futuristic memorial hall. It begins by moving steadily toward a wide staircase flanked by massive golden statues under a dark sky, before passing under a district welcome sign to enter the building. As the camera ascends a glass-railed stairwell, the scene opens into the grand Harold Hurston Memorial Hall, where the space is dominated by a central golden statue and glass weapon displays. The view then shifts away from the main monument toward a secondary hall marked by a hologram sign, ascending another set of stairs into a more enclosed environment. Finally, the camera glides through a narrow corridor featuring the spotlight-lit Legacy wall exhibit before approaching a glass entrance to the final chamber.
